_comment: PIM Manager MSP instance registry. Copy to instances.custom.json (gitignored) and edit.
Each instance points at one customer's PIM4EntraPS config folder (the 14 CSVs +
NamingConventions files). outputRoot is optional -- defaults to a sibling 'output'
folder next to the configRoot. The solution's own config/ folder is always available
as the built-in instance named 'local' and must not be declared here.
Pick the startup instance with: .\Open-PimManager.ps1 -Instance customerA
or switch live via the instance dropdown in the Manager header.
